display_text: Boundless, Cost: 0: Neutral Upgrade item that permanently increases Attack Range by 150 and Cast Range by 275. This significant range boost enhances the safety and reach of both right-click and spell-based heroes, allowing them to operate from further away in engagements. Stats: Attack Range: +150, Cast Range: +275.
